summary: Diagnosed the tender verification failure and confirmed it was caused by polluted sample-user creation: res.users.create defaults sc_role_profile to owner and syncs owner overlay groups, so the supposed project_read sample was never pure. Real runtime roles now match the intended tender read-vs-execution split.

notes: The previous failure was rooted in sample construction rather than tender ACL semantics.
Further ACL changes are not the next safe step.
Verification coverage must be realigned to use role-accurate samples.

next_step: Open a narrow follow-up batch to replace polluted tender verification samples with real delivered-role assertions.
